title: Commonwealth Shared Scholarships
description: UK Government-funded taught master's scholarships for students from developing Commonwealth countries, funding tuition, a living stipend, and airfare to the UK. Eligible countries include Pakistan, India, Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, South Africa, Rwanda, and Fiji, among 20+ others. The application round typically opens in September and closes mid-October each year.
org: Commonwealth Scholarship Commission in the UK
visaNote: Student visa sponsored as part of the scholarship.

title: TechWomen
description: U.S. State Department mentorship and exchange program for emerging women leaders in STEM from Africa, Central and South Asia, and the Middle East. Includes four weeks in the San Francisco Bay Area or Chicago for project-based mentorships at host companies, concluding with events in Washington DC. Covers international travel, housing, meals, incidentals, and local transportation.
visaNote: J-1 exchange visitor visa sponsored by the program.
